services.heading: Nyochaa Anwansi Dị N'azụ Omenala Anyị

learnLanguage.title: Mụta Asụsụ
learnLanguage.description: Chọpụta ịma mma nke asụsụ ndị Africa ma jikọọ na omenala dị iche iche n'ofe kọntinent ahụ.

exploreIdentity.title: Nyochaa njirimara na omenala
exploreIdentity.description: Kpughee njem na mmegharị ndị kpụrụ omenala dị iche iche nke Afrika ma jikọta ndị ya site na oge.

streamFolklore.title: Lelee akụkọ ifo, egwu, na akụkọ
streamFolklore.description: Kpughee mgbọrọgwụ nke njirimara Afrika na omenala ebighị ebi ndị a na-enyefe site n'ọgbọ rue n'ọgbọ.

about.title: Maka Magical Africa
about.description: Magical Africa na-eme emume ịma mma, omenala, na akụkọ nke Afrika. Anyị na-egosi omenala bara ụba nke kọntinent ahụ, ala dị iche iche, na mmụọ dị ndụ, na-ekekọrịta ihe na-eme Afrika bụrụ nke anwansi n'ezie.

maasaiBracelets.title: Aka ọla Maasai
maasaiBracelets.description: Aka ọla Maasai nwere shanga na-egosipụta omenala na nka.

beadedJewelery.title: Ihe ịchọ mma shanga
beadedJewelery.description: Ihe ịchọ mma nkume emere n'aka nwere ịma mma nke okike.

maasaiNecklaces.title: Olu ọla Maasai
maasaiNecklaces.description: Olu ọla shanga Maasai omenala nwere agba dị ndụ.

ankaraGown.title: Uwe Ankara
ankaraGown.description: Emere ya site na akwa Ankara, a na-eyi ya n'omenala Naịjirịa dị iche iche.

maasaiLeso.title: Leso Maasai
maasaiLeso.description: Ndị nwoke na ndị nwanyị Maasai na-eyi ya na Kenya na Tanzania.

kitenge.title: Kitenge
kitenge.description: Emere ya site na akwa owu nwere usoro dị egwu maka ndị nwoke na ndị nwanyị.

carpentryTools.title: Ngwa ọkpụkpụ osisi
carpentryTools.description: Ngwa ọkpụkpụ osisi nke ndị nka maka ọrụ aka zuru oke.

farmingTools.title: Ngwa ọrụ ugbo
farmingTools.description: Ngwa ọrụ ugbo omenala ka a na-eji taa.

traditionalSpears.title: Ube omenala
traditionalSpears.description: Ube emere n'aka ndị agha ji na akụkọ ihe mere eme.

drums.title: Ịgba
drums.description: Ịgba omenala Afrika maka emume na nnọkọ.

stringInstruments.title: Ngwa egwu eriri
stringInstruments.description: Ngwa egwu eriri emere n'aka nwere ụda pụrụ iche.

windInstruments.title: Ngwa egwu ikuku
windInstruments.description: Opi na mpi omenala emere site na ihe ndị okike.
